strengths: 19 years of progressive software engineering experience with demonstrated technical growth from developer to staff engineer across diverse domains
Proven founder and open-source platform architect (GISCollective) with Kubernetes deployment experience and large-scale infrastructure work handling millions of requests/second
Full-stack technical fluency across multiple languages and architectural layers (microservices, real-time data processing, async I/O, cloud infrastructure via AWS CDK)
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML—a stated preferred qualification for this director-level AI strategy role
AI experience is only 1-2 months old at current role (MCP/agentic infrastructure); zero demonstrated AI products, ML models, or AI-driven platforms built to market
Career pattern shows hands-on engineering and systems work, not strategic advisory or AI adoption leadership; no evidence of customer-facing strategy or platform direction-setting work
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, experienced engineer with 19 years of progressive technical work and strong infrastructure credentials. However, this Principal Engineer role explicitly requires AI strategy leadership and preferred qualifications include Master's/PhD in AI with demonstrated AI products. His experience is primarily hands-on systems engineering; his AI exposure is confined to infrastructure work over the past 1–2 months at re:cinq, with no evidence of building AI products, driving AI adoption strategy, or advising customers on AI technologies. He is well-suited for a Staff Engineer infrastructure role but lacks the domain expertise and track record required for a director-level AI strategy position.
